findings.title: Inactive enabled users require review
findings.description: 18 enabled users are older than the inactivity threshold in this sample.
findings.technical_details: The fictional sample threshold is 90 days.
findings.business_impact: Unused enabled accounts can retain access after role changes or departure.
findings.recommendation: Validate ownership and disable confirmed unused accounts before deletion.

findings.title: Privileged membership baseline changed
findings.description: The sample privileged group baseline contains one unvalidated change.
findings.technical_details: A fictional new member was present in the current snapshot.
findings.business_impact: Unvalidated privileged access can increase administrative exposure.
findings.recommendation: Confirm approval and expected duration before accepting the new baseline.
